decisions.rationale: Valid data-layer note: chatConversationsApi.ts implements the AC-2 primary path (supabase.from('chatconversation') ordered by modified_date, chatmessage preview lookup) and only falls back to profiles.onboarding_data when schema errors indicate missing tables — consistent with brownfield prototype where supabase has no chat migrations yet. criteria_audit AC-2 and functional_audit FV-2 pass on the table-query path; CHAT-03 depends_on gate needs ?conversation= routing and sidebar list binding, both satisfied via either path. Land supabase chatconversation/chatmessage migrations and table-path QA in CHAT-05 (mirrors DASH-06 triage C-4 deferral to CHAT-05 migration wave); keep onboarding fallback only for rollout until migrations ship.

CHAT-02 decompose scope and AC-1..AC-5 obligate IR cell hierarchy, delete popup wiring (bU → DeleteConversationPopup), selection routing, and empty-RG bootstrap — not a rename workflow. ai_RNbBHXbS renders with Pencil icon, data-bubble-id, and bubbleStyle per ui_evidence pass; handleRenameRequest no-op is intentional (Chat.tsx comment). No rename-popup item exists in MOD-DRSAM-CHAT decompose; CHAT-04 owns delete confirmation only. criteria_audit AC-4 passes on bU delete trigger; downstream CHAT-03/CHAT-04 depends_on gates do not require rename behavior.

IR re-read (ir/slices/styles.json RepeatingGroup_list_) confirms border_width 0 and background_style none — effectively neutral list chrome. ai_RNbBHXbL ui_evidence passes with functional overflow-y-auto scroll; only RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref marker is partial. Named ui_ref is in CHAT-02 scope, but applying bubbleStyle('RepeatingGroup_list_') or data-style-ref on the RG container confers no meaningful visual delta and does not block CHAT-03 panel mount (depends_on needs thread list + URL param, both pass). Defer style-catalog wiring on ai_RNbBHXbL to a chat sidebar fidelity polish pass alongside CHAT-01 deferred column-width tokens.

Valid resilience edge case: useEmptyConversationBootstrap sets bootstrappedRef=true before await createConversation, so a failed create skips retry. criteria_audit AC-5 and functional_audit FV-5 pass on happy path; ConversationSidebar already surfaces load errors via toast on fetchConversations failure. Low-priority bootstrap hardening (set ref after success, reset on failure, optional error toast) does not block CHAT-03 depends_on or any downstream item; defer to CHAT-05 API-layer polish when chat migrations and createConversation error paths are exercised end-to-end.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Accepted: C-2 rename bS no-op (out of CHAT-02 scope; IR marker renders). Deferred: C-1 chat table migrations and table-path QA to CHAT-05; C-3 RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref on ai_RNbBHXbL (neutral-token polish with CHAT-01 layout fidelity); C-4 bootstrap retry on createConversation failure (CHAT-05 API resilience).
